name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Profiting off job losses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
It's time to fight back. It's time to elect a leader who will fight for Hoosier families -- not his friends' bottom lines.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, When Carrier workers learned they were losing their jobs, Governor Pence dropped the ball. And while those workers were wondering how they'd make ends meet, Donald Trump was profiting from an investment in Carrier's parent company. Is it any wonder that a governor who refuses to protect workers from outsourcing might soon join the ticket of a man who profits from companies that ship jobs overseas? It's time to fight back. It's time to elect a leader who will fight for Hoosier families -- not his friends' bottom lines. **Will you chip in $5 to help John Gregg fight for Hoosiers as your next governor?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Express Donate: $5 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

[**Express Donate: $25 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---

[**Express Donate: $50 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---

[**Or, donate another amount** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
There's a reason John Gregg's won the support of both unions and business leaders across Indiana. He understands what it takes to create jobs, and he has a plan to get Indiana's economy back on track.
He'll fight to bring good-paying jobs to Indiana -- instead of letting them get shipped to Mexico.
Governor Pence may have billionaire Donald Trump's support, but John's counting on the support of everyday Hoosiers like you.
**[Will you chip in $5 to help John build a campaign strong enough to win in November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**
Thanks for your support,
Tim Henderson
Campaign Manager
Gregg for Governor

| [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9209441667826448384/6095762334004152320?utm_campaign=fnd_trumpc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160711_fnd_gq_trumpc_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)

name: Jordan Marks
subject: [READ] Campaign Strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25)
---
| | Friends,

There are only 119 days until Election Day, and I promise you they're going to whiz by faster than you think. The hard truth is that we're up against a powerful political machine, funded by Toomey's Wall Street and special interest friends, and we're going to have to fight smart and fight hard if we're going to come out on top.

That's why I want to share our campaign strategy -- [**and ask for your help**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25) -- to build the powerful grassroots infrastructure we need now to drive our campaign to victory in November.

**1\. Mobilizing the grassroots**
In the lead up to Election Day, our grassroots network is going to give us a boost that Toomey's special interests can't match. Our thousands of supporters will be making calls, knocking on doors, and having real conversations -- face-to-face -- with voters about how important this race is.

[**Chip in to equip and mobilize volunteers >**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25)
**2\. Getting our message out**
Pennsylvanians need to hear from Katie -- but we have to break through the deluge of Toomey's misleading attack ads to reach them. We'll rely on supporters like you to talk with friends and spread the word on social media, but we'll also need to get our message up on TV and radio to reach more undecided voters.

[**Chip in to help us spread the word >**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25)
**3\. Building strong coalitions**
Katie is fighting for _all_ Pennsylvanians, and we need to make sure all Pennsylvanians are part of this effort. We'll continue to work closely with community leaders, faith organizations, women's groups, business leaders, environmental groups, labor unions, and more to build a robust, diverse campaign.

[**Chip in to build our movement >**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25)
This is an ambitious plan, certainly, but it's one that Pat Toomey can't match (even with his big Wall Street backers) because it leverages the power of everyday people, working together, to get something done.

You're a powerful part of the engine we're trying to build -- and if you can, **please pitch in to help us put this strategy into action. Even a small contribution will make a big impact:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/elect-katie**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25)

We're going to win this together,

Jordan Marks
Campaign Manager |
---|---|---

*** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 or more today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160711&refcode2=e20160711nd&amount=25 "https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6604504664283021312?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/9085547283650445312/-6676562258320949248).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Gwen Graham
subject: Why I'm with Patrick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b64b/333261038/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160711gg?refcode=pme160711gg_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Folks, I am proud to support my friend Patrick Murphy to be Florida's next U.S. Senator -- and let me tell you why.

When my father was Florida's Senator, I so admired his willingness to roll up his sleeves and not stop fighting until the job was done.

**I see that same leadership quality in Patrick.** He's already fighting for our Florida values in Washington, and I have no doubt he'll bring that same tireless work ethic to the Senate. This will be a Senator who puts Florida families first.

But friend, Patrick needs to raise $20,000 by his mid-month deadline on Friday. [**Will you please contribute to his campaign today -- for me, and for Patrick?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b64b/333261038/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160711gg?refcode=pme160711gg_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

In Congress, Patrick and I have worked together to protect the Everglades and the Apalachicola Bay. It hasn't been easy, but at every turn, Patrick has never lost sight of what truly matters.

That's the type of leadership Floridians deserve in the Senate.

[**So friend, I hope you 'll join me in supporting Patrick's campaign. Please chip in $5 or $10 today.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b64b/333261038/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160711gg?refcode=pme160711gg_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks,
Gwen |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b644/333261038/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b645/333261038/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2016 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c2b/738133e4/37dec949/7f82b646/333261038/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
---

name: John Carney
subject: It's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-7252741535647662080?midqs=1000925017183092736)
---
| | | | | | | | | Dear friend, Today I officially launched my campaign by filing to run for governor of our great state of Delaware. Creating good paying jobs that can support Delaware families should be our state's top priority. Our state is transitioning from an economy built around a few, large employers to a diverse one focused on innovation and entrepreneurship. We need to make sure our state and our workforce are positioned to be successful in this new economy. Building a strong workforce relies in part on strengthening Delaware's schools. Our education system needs to be more flexible and teachers need more resources to help our kids compete in an increasingly global economy. I encourage you to visit my website,**[ www.johncarney.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-7252741535647662080?midqs=1000925017183092736)**, to learn about what I will accomplish as your governor. If you'd like to donate to my campaign, please visit my website, **[www.johncarney.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-7252741535647662080?midqs=1000925017183092736)** , and click on the contribute button. **[You can also click on the image below to see my announcement video](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-7036568753533878272?midqs=1000925017183092736):** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-6964511159495950336?midqs=1000925017183092736) I know the job ahead will be difficult, but I'm running for governor because our state needs someone with the vision and courage to lead Delaware into the future. I'm ready for that job. Thanks for all your support, John
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-6892453565458022400?am=&recipientId=58ALV4wVN5uKbcFGD7pzR2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6952814683648688128/-6820395971420094464?recipientId=58ALV4wVN5uKbcFGD7pzR2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) | Paid for by Friends for John Carney
---
Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States

body:

name: TEAM COLE
subject: ICYMI: Cole Outlines Plans to Move WV Forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
Bill Cole continues to travel the state meeting with and helping those affected by the flooding last month. He will be in Hinton, WV this week to meet with local officials. In addition, he has been sitting down with editorial boards to discuss the response to the flooding and his plans to move our state forward. Recently, he met with the _Clarksburg Exponent-Telegram_ and laid out his vision for West Virginia. He began the meeting by stating: _Before I can talk politics, I have to speak a moment to what I’ve seen with the flood damage and how people reacted. The overwhelming takeaway, from people who have lost everything, who have no insurance ... and yet everybody has a positive attitude. They aren’t asking for a bailout ... for state or federal aid. We have West Virginians helping West Virginians. We don’t have looting. We have people helping people. I’ve never been so proud to be a West Virginian._ The full story can be found [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theet.com%2Fnews%2Flocal%2Fcole-sings-state-s-praises-conservative-values-as-he-campaigns%2Farticle_be66ab30-e45c-5575-8b45-85387f88cf2c.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=1). Last Friday, Bill Cole was in the Eastern Panhandle where he sat down with the editors of _The Journal_ (Martinsburg) to discuss his plan to get West Virginia moving again. He summed up his plan by saying: _At the end of the day, if you really want to put it as simple as you can state it, I want to create an environment where our kids can stay home, find their future and grow their families - that's it. If we can put people to work, if we can educate, if we can fix the drug problem, fix educations, if we can do all those things and come together to turn our state around, (people will want to stay). I'm committed to being a governor for the state 24/7, not just for the show, but also for the heavy lifting._ You can read the full story [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.journal-news.net%2Fpage%2Fcontent.detail%2Fid%2F660997.html&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=2). **TEAM COLE** P.S. More information on Bill Cole’s plan to make _West Virginia Proud and West Virginia Strong_ can be found [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/issues?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=3). Stay tuned for more details in the coming weeks. [http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=4)
---
---

---
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.billcolewv.com/unsubscribe?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bill_cole_plan&n=12), the essential toolkit for leaders.
clean_body: | | | Friend -- Bill Cole continues to travel the state meeting with and helping those affected by the flooding last month. He will be in Hinton, WV this week to meet with local officials. In addition, he has been sitting down with editorial boards to discuss the response to the flooding and his plans to move our state forward. Recently, he met with the Clarksburg Exponent-Telegram and laid out his vision for West Virginia. He began the meeting by stating: Before I can talk politics, I have to speak a moment to what I’ve seen with the flood damage and how people reacted. The overwhelming takeaway, from people who have lost everything, who have no insurance ... and yet everybody has a positive attitude. They aren’t asking for a bailout ... for state or federal aid. We have West Virginians helping West Virginians. We don’t have looting. We have people helping people. I’ve never been so proud to be a West Virginian. The full story can be found . Last Friday, Bill Cole was in the Eastern Panhandle where he sat down with the editors of The Journal (Martinsburg) to discuss his plan to get West Virginia moving again. He summed up his plan by saying: At the end of the day, if you really want to put it as simple as you can state it, I want to create an environment where our kids can stay home, find their future and grow their families - that's it. If we can put people to work, if we can educate, if we can fix the drug problem, fix educations, if we can do all those things and come together to turn our state around, (people will want to stay). I'm committed to being a governor for the state 24/7, not just for the show, but also for the heavy lifting. You can read the full story . TEAM COLE P.S. More information on Bill Cole’s plan to make West Virginia Proud and West Virginia Strong can be found . Stay tuned for more details in the coming weeks. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE Friends of Bill Cole · United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: ~the big announcement~
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I want you to literally be the FIRST to know | Friend --

You are one of Hillary’s strongest supporters, and this team is how we're going to win this election. That’s why I want you to be literally the FIRST one to know when this team gets a little bigger -- and Hillary announces her running mate.

**[Sign up for our text message updates here -- and when Hillary makes the big decision, we’ll text you within seconds!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU5NTMwMTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNTQwMzY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Everyone always gets excited about running mate announcements. (I’m one of those people, too!) But finding out who’s going to be at Hillary’s side as we ramp us this campaign should be a special moment for amazing supporters like you -- you’re the reason we’ve gotten this far, and you’ll help Hillary and her running mate get over the finish line. So when the moment comes, we want to be able to reach you as directly and quickly as possible.

**Add your name and number below, and we’ll let you know with a text message as soon as the decision is final:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5NTMwMTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNTQwMzY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

|

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: From bad to worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Did you see this?
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7489164021547726080/82137909897136896?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Did you see this, Peter? Consultants and lawyers hired by the Utah legislature to seize 31 million acres of public land (in order to sell to the highest bidder) are now being investigated for using taxpayer money for five-star hotels and first-class airfare. This is absolutely ridiculous. It's clearer than ever that Utah needs a change in leadership to restore responsibility to our government. **[Will you donate $20 now to help us make that change?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7489164021547726080/82137909897136896?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Whether you're a Republican or a Democrat, ALL Utahns value fiscal responsibility. It's just who we are. We teach our children from a young age to budget wisely and save for a rainy day. Unfortunately, in our current governor's haste to privatize our public lands, he and the legislature have abandoned that value. Instead of wise spending and responsible monitoring, they've checked out and let high-dollar consultants run amok **with up to $14 million of our Utah tax dollars.** What's more, this entire endeavor is pointless: constitutional experts have said Utah can't win these costly lawsuits, yet the legislature has charged headlong anyway. Enough is enough. **[Donate today to reaffirm Utah's commitment to our shared values, like accountability and financial responsibility.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7489164021547726080/82137909897136896?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---
Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7489164021547726080/10080315859208960).

body:

name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: Thursday: Come see Hillary and Tim Kaine in Northern Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

The Commonwealth has a big role to play in this election, and no one knows that better than Hillary.

She’s coming to Northern Virginia with our very own Senator Tim Kaine on Thursday to talk about their shared commitment to building an America that is stronger together -- and you should be there.

**[RSVP now to be in the room:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5NTQ0NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNTU4Mzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**WHAT:** Join Hillary and Tim Kaine in Annandale!
**WHEN:** Thursday, July 14th, 2016
Doors open at 1:15 p.m.
**WHERE:** Ernst Gym at Northern Virginia Community College
8333 Little River Turnpike
Annandale, Virginia 22003

We made history in the primary by putting a big crack in the highest, hardest glass ceiling in America -- this November, we Virginians can help Hillary and other Democrats win.

**Let’s show Hillary we have her back in Virginia -- RSVP now to join her and Senator Kaine on Thursday:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5NTQ0NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNTU4Mzg5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
We'll see you there!

Hillary for Virginia

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: [TAKE ACTION] : end dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
> Friend,
>
> Campaign finance reform has always been an issue in American politics. But, six years ago the Supreme Court opened the floodgates WIDE to millions of dollars of secret dark money from corporations and billionaires.
>
> With its Citizens United decision, the Court allowed behind-the-scenes organizations and wealthy insiders to influence elections unfairly with unlimited dark money. The decision has inflicted mayhem on our political system -- and that's never been clearer than during this election.
>
> [**Right wing extremists like the Koch brothers have announced they will be working harder than ever this year to influence statewide elections across the country. Can you add your name here to the list of Americans saying they DON'T want the best Congress Koch money can buy?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d8f/70cdc2ba/47fb4c29/3970ce2/311849137/VEsH/ "http://www.signforgood.com/campaignfinance/?code=vanhollen&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em071116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Right+wing+extremists+like+the+Koch+brot&utm_campaign=em071116&source=em071116")
>
> The _Washington Post_ recently wrote about one of the Koch brothers' shady dark money organizations, _Americans for Prosperity,_ gearing up to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to influence the outcome of just _**one**_ close Congressional race in Colorado.
>
> It's just another example of how the Citizens United decision puts money ahead of the will of the people. And here in Maryland the head of Citizens United is leading the effort to fill my opponent's campaign war chest.
>
> With so much at stake, we can't sit by and accept this bad decision. [**Please add your name here to send an unmistakable message that the people of this country want campaign finance reform and the repeal of Citizens United.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d8f/70cdc2ba/47fb4c29/3970ce3/311849137/VEsE/ "http://www.signforgood.com/campaignfinance/?code=vanhollen&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em071116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+here+to+send+an+unm&utm_campaign=em071116&source=em071116")
>
> Thank you for taking action.
>
> Pat Murray
> Campaign Manager
> Van Hollen For U.S. Senate

>
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d8f/70cdc2ba/47fb4c29/3970ce0/311849137/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em071116&source=em071116") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
clean_body: | Friend, Campaign finance reform has always been an issue in American politics. But, six years ago the Supreme Court opened the floodgates WIDE to millions of dollars of secret dark money from corporations and billionaires. With its Citizens United decision, the Court allowed behind-the-scenes organizations and wealthy insiders to influence elections unfairly with unlimited dark money. The decision has inflicted mayhem on our political system -- and that's never been clearer than during this election. "" The Washington Post recently wrote about one of the Koch brothers' shady dark money organizations, Americans for Prosperity, gearing up to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to influence the outcome of just one close Congressional race in Colorado. It's just another example of how the Citizens United decision puts money ahead of the will of the people. And here in Maryland the head of Citizens United is leading the effort to fill my opponent's campaign war chest. With so much at stake, we can't sit by and accept this bad decision. "" Thank you for taking action. Pat Murray Campaign Manager Van Hollen For U.S. Senate Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Mitch McConnell, the Koch Brothers, and the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb4602/2257309036/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb4602/2257309036/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Alright, team -- here's the deal:
**Kelly Ayotte just cut our small lead in the polls IN HALF.** That makes me nervous that we're not going to have the funds we need to fight back against Ayotte's corporate special interest allies -- like the NRA and the Koch Brothers.
Our Senate race in New Hampshire is projected to be one of the most expensive EVER, and if we don't keep our fundraising up, we'll be in serious trouble.
[**Don't let corporate special interests buy this seat. Give now to elect Maggie, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb4603/2257309036/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzExcG1fRlJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160711pm_FR_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Last quarter, our corporate special interest-backed opponent posted her best fundraising numbers yet. Add in the MILLIONS corporate special interests like the NRA, the Koch Brothers, and Mitch McConnell-linked groups are spending to make sure Maggie doesn't win and we've got a lot of work to do.
With Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, we can't afford to fall behind while right-wing corporate special interests pour in money. [**Please, donate $3 or more to this campaign today to get Maggie back on track to win this race.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb4603/2257309036/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzExcG1fRlJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160711pm_FR_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Maggie is counting on your support!
Emily Mellencamp Smith
Finance Director, Maggie for NH

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb4603/2257309036/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzExcG1fRlJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160711pm_FR_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5ce/2a380d31/10eb5903/fb460c/2257309036/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
